title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard present an AI Research OS that transforms 10,000+ notes, documents, and repositories from an Obsidian vault into live context for AI agents. The system uses a three-layer architecture with raw content, indexed knowledge, and a wiki layer to enable efficient token-based memory without relying on vector or graph databases.
writeup: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard present an AI Research OS that converts more than 10,000 notes, documents, and repositories from an Obsidian vault into live context for AI agents. The system runs on a three-layer architecture: raw content, indexed knowledge, and a wiki layer. This design enables token-based memory without vector or graph databases, addressing context management for agents that draw on large personal knowledge bases.
